column3: "…I have not reviewed the scan results yet but from my initial observations, there are dark spots on the lungs and on the left breast, indicating the possibility that there might be tumors. There might not be tumors. But if it turns out that there are, like I suspect, then I will have to determine if the tumors are cancerous or non-cancerous. And if they are cancerous, are they malignant or benign. And if they are malignant, are they terminal or non-terminal..."

column23: ... I neva chook eye for de scan result finish but  as for de first eye wey i take luk am, e get some dark spots for de two lungs and for de breast wey dey left side, meaning sey e fit be swelling/tumor na im dey dia. E fit be say swelling/tumor no dey dia. But if e come be say de tumor/swelling dey dia, as i dey reason am, wetin go happen be sey we go check whether de tumor/swelling dey cause cancer abi e no dey cause cancer. If de tumor or swelling na de type wey dey cause cancer, de cancer na de type wey dey dangerous abi na de type wey no dey dangerous and if e dey dangerous , na de type wey go kill abi na de type wey no go kill

column3: "…Statistics do not lie. My sample size is 100 and it is from a total population size of 1000. I broke the 1000 population into 25 sub clusters and picked 4 samples from each cluster. So my sampling methodology is accurate. I even adjusted my results for standard deviation. I can infer from the results that my team obtained, that the rains will come early this year and that there will be a bumper harvest in areas bordering the sub Sahel regions of Ghana, Togo, Benin, Nigeria and Cameroon..."

column20:
2.1 - Statistics do not lie.
"...Mathematics no dey lie

2.2 - My sample size is 100 and it is from a total population size of 1000.
"...De sample wey i use na 100 and e com from everitin wey be 1000

2.3 - I broke the 1000 population into 25 sub clusters and picked 4 samples from each cluster
"...i share de 1000 from everitin wey dey to 25 small small group and i com pick 4 for inside all of dem

2.4 - So my sampling methodology is accurate.
"...De pattern wey i use take do dis tin e correct well well

2.5 - I even adjusted my results for standard deviation.
 "...I even arrange am well for my calculation

2.6 - I can infer from the results that my team obtained, 
"...from de result wey my team get.

2. 7 - that the rains will come early this year 
"...I fit conclude say rain go com quick quick dis year

2. 8 - and that there will be a bumper harvest
"...and harvest go plenty well well

2. 9 - in areas bordering the sub Sahel regions of Ghana, Togo, Benin, Nigeria and Cameroon..."
"...For de areas wey dey around Sub Sahel for Ghana, Togo, Benin, Naija & Cameroon.

2.5 -  I even arrange am well for standard deviation.

2.6 - From de result wey my team get

2.7 - I fit conclude say rain go com quick quick dis year

2.8 - and harvest go plenty well well

2.9  - For de areas wey dey around Sub Sahel for Ghana, Togo, Benin, Naija & Cameroon

column20:
4.1 - This agreement allows the assignor to assign, sell, convey, and transfer all of assignor's interest in a particular contract to assignee.
"...As we don gree say make de persin wey be de owner wey get power ontop dis our mata giv am to anoda persin, .you wey get de powa before to sell convey or transfer gree say make dis new persin take ova

4.2 - Assignee agrees to hold harmless and indemnify assignor for such liens, claims or encumbrances
"...you wey take ova don gree say you go cova de persin wey give you de powa, pay any anytin wey be gbese money, any persin wey e dey owe wey come look for am you go settle de mata.

4.3 - Assignor represents and warrants that his/her interest in the contract subject to this assignment is free of liens, claims or encumbrances of any kind by third parties.
"...The persin wey dey hand ova dey assure you say ontop this mata wey e give you so, no wahala dey inside am,me wey dey hand ova dey beat my chest say you no get any shakin for dis mata nobodi fit com chance you on top am.

4.3 - The assignor dey assure am say ontop dis mata wey e giv am so, no wahala dey inside am, him wey dey hand ova dey beat e chest say you no get any shakin for dis matter, nobodi fit com chance you on top am.

column3:
"…   The objectives of these Regulations are to —
(a) protect human health and environment from the harmful effect of
chemicals, pesticides and other agrochemicals and to —
(i) promote safety in their use,
(ii) control the import, export, sale and handling of chemicals, and
(ii) contribute to the sustainable development of agriculture and the
conservation of the environment ;
(5) ensure an Environmentally Sound Management (ESM) of chemical
and pesticides within their life cycle for the protection of human health and
environment ;  .... "
column4: A mix of literal and contextual depending on the audience

chemicals, pesticides and other agrochemicals 

5.2 - And to promote safety in their use, control the import, export, sale and handling of chemicals 

5.3 - And contribute to the sustainable development of agriculture and the
conservation of the environment 

5.4 - ensure an Environmentally Sound Management (ESM) of chemical
and pesticides within their life cycle for the protection of human health and
environment

5.1 - The objectives of these Regulations are
"...Wetin dem cari for mind comot dis regulation be say

5.2 - to protect human health and environment from the harmful effect of chemicals, pesticides and other agrochemicals
"...say make dem protect pipo life an de area wey dem dey live, make all de kemikal wey dey kpai insect join de one wey dem spray put for farmland no spoil tins 

5.3 - and to promote safety in their use,
"...make dem dey sure say e dey safe for pipo wey dey use am 

5.4 - control the import, export, sale and handling of chemicals
"...dey check how e dey tak enta we contri, how e dey take comot, how pipo dey tak sell am join how dem dey tak handle am

5.5 - and contribute to the sustainable development of agriculture and the
conservation of the environment
"...even how dis chemicals dem fit join beta we farmwork dem, make e tey, how e go folo kip we area for beta shape

5.6 - ensure an Environmentally Sound Management (ESM) of chemical
and pesticides within their life cycle
"...make sure say e follo Environmentally Sound Management pattern wey concine de kemikal, even de one wey dey kpai insect, from wen dem make am to wen e go expire, dem call am ESM.

5.7 - for the protection of human health and
environment
"...make e kip we area an no kpai de pipo wey dey live inside am.
